mechanism_narrative: Declines in the federal funds rate reduce the discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, mechanically lifting equity valuations and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns are not significantly positive when FEDFUNDS declines.

mechanism_narrative: When the unemployment rate exceeds 9.0 percent, consumer spending capacity contracts sharply, reducing corporate revenue growth expectations and driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in more than 55 percent of instances where UNRATE exceeds 9.0, or the signal loses predictive power with Rank IC below 0.01 in post-recession periods.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate broad-based consumer demand expansion, which translates into higher corporate earnings and positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint signal fails to produce positive returns in more than 60 percent of co-occurring upward moves, or the interaction term marginal predictive power is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production signals improving manufacturing throughput and supply-side capacity utilization, generating short-term positive momentum in S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days during early recovery phases.
failure_condition: 5-day forward returns are negative or flat in more than 50 percent of rising INDPRO observations, or the signal reverses direction in late-cycle regimes.

mechanism_narrative: When the consumer price index exceeds 215.0, rising input costs compress corporate profit margins and increase the probability of restrictive monetary policy, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Forward returns remain positive in more than 65 percent of periods where CPIAUCSL exceeds 215.0, or the threshold effect disappears after controlling for nominal GDP growth.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in total nonfarm payrolls and a declining unemployment rate confirm robust labor market tightening, which supports consumer spending and drives positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: The combined signal yields negative returns in more than 55 percent of observations, or the interaction effect is statistically insignificant in out-of-sample walk-forward tests.

mechanism_narrative: Expanding real gross domestic product reflects sustained aggregate demand growth, which mechanically increases corporate revenue baselines and generates positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC falls below 0.02 over rolling 3-year windows, or forward returns are not significantly positive during periods of positive GDPC1 growth.

mechanism_narrative: When the index of industrial production falls below 90.0, severe manufacturing contraction signals imminent earnings downgrades and credit stress, triggering negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive 5-day returns occur in more than 60 percent of instances where INDPRO falls below 90.0, or the signal fails to predict direction in out-of-sample testing.
